Off Calendar Dec-21-2007 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Continued To Dec-31-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Nov-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Holt-Smith.
Thomas A. Moore, Esq. for Plaintiff: Grace Reynaud, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, matter submitted and taken under submission for review.

Nov. 9, 2007
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Constance Carter as follows:
Damages $17,116.46
Costs $335.00, for a total of $17,451.46
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
